title: RickCore
description: A library with common code for my mods
body:
***This library serves to cooperate with the operation of my mods and better compatibility between them***

***
[CollectAll - Ores, Trees and Crops (v1.3+)](https://modrinth.com/mod/collectall-ores-trees-and-crops)

[Reroll - Enchants and Trades (v1.1.0+)](https://modrinth.com/mod/reroll-enchants-and-trades)

***
There is no need to download RickCore unless some other mod requires it, as it does not contain any content on its own.
